##NONVSAM
MY.SITE.LOADLIB VOL001 PO FB 80 27920
MY.SITE.SEQFILE VOL002 PS FB 133 1330
##LISTCAT
CLUSTER ------- MY.VSAM.KSDS1
      IN-CAT --- CATALOG.NAME
  DATA ------- MY.VSAM.KSDS1.DATA
      IN-CAT --- CATALOG.NAME
      ATTRIBUTES
        KEYLEN----------------20    AVGLRECL-------------100
        RKP--------------------0    MAXLRECL--------------200
        INDEXED                  NOERASE
      VOLUMES
        VOLSER-----------VOL001    PHYREC-SIZE------------4096
  INDEX ------ MY.VSAM.KSDS1.INDEX
      IN-CAT --- CATALOG.NAME
CLUSTER ------- MY.VSAM.ESDS1
      IN-CAT --- CATALOG.NAME
  DATA ------- MY.VSAM.ESDS1.DATA
      IN-CAT --- CATALOG.NAME
      ATTRIBUTES
        NONINDEXED                NOERASE
